name: Golden Cream Potato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Add water to potatoes, celery, onions, parsley, seasonings, and bouillon cube.
2. Cover and cook until tender.
3. Blend flour with a small amount of milk and stir into the vegetable mixture.
4. Add remaining milk and cook until thickened.
5. Add Velveeta cheese and stir until melted.
